title: Frog Crosshair
description: Gifts you with a frog crosshair
body:
# **Frog Crosshair**

***

### In dark environments it works well
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3LbbbG24/images/c22d4ad2f1f918dee74904ed13213b8e246ceb82.png)

### In light environments it becomes a bit inverted and harder to see
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3LbbbG24/images/fd5152ed6c661f305c49eb5cde8d323da8403af5.png)

**This is because Minecraft crosshairs usally use only white to function perfectly**

## But before leaving, **Why not try it yourself?**

***

**All art was arted by yours truly! Using *Aseprite*.**
